yacl3.config.aiutd:config.menuAlert.desc: Should a button display on the Main Menu when an update is available
yacl3.config.aiutd:config.chatAlert.desc: Should a message display in the chat when an update is available
yacl3.config.aiutd:config.localVersion.d: Enter the version of the modpack as it will be set when uploading to Modrinth
yacl3.config.aiutd:config.versionAPI.des: Enter your Modpack's Modrinth ID. eg: 'B9GZBYa6'
Enter your Modrinth slug or changelog URL. eg: 'modern-hypixel-skyblock' or 'https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/modern-hypixel-skyblock/changelog'
yacl3.config.aiutd:config.multiVersion.d: Does the modpack support multiple versions of Minecraft
yacl3.config.aiutd:config.multiLoaderBoo: Does the modpack support multiple mod loaders
yacl3.config.aiutd:config.multiLoader.de: Set the modloader that will be looked for when checking for updates
yacl3.config.aiutd:config.useModpackName: Should the chat message include the modpack's name
yacl3.config.aiutd:config.modpackName.de: Set the modpacks name for use in chat messages
yacl3.config.aiutd:config.useCustomMessa: Toggle a custom message for chat notifications
Should there be a link to the changelog in the chat notification
yacl3.config.aiutd:config.changelogColor: Set the color of the changelog link in chat. Default: Red
yacl3.config.aiutd:config.messageColor.d: Set the color of the update notice in chat. Default: White
yacl3.config.aiutd:config.ignoreColor.de: Set the color of the ignore update notice option in chat. Default: Gray
aiutd.modPackNameMsg: There is an update available for
aiutd.defaultMsg: There is an update available for your modpack!
aiutd.msgsIgnored: You have set chat notifications to be ignored!
aiutd.runToIgnore: Run the command '/shouldIgnore' to hide this message
aiutd.fancymenu.update_button.desc.line1: A button that appears when a modpack update is available.
aiutd.fancymenu.update_button.desc.line2: Fully customizable with backgrounds, sounds, and actions.
aiutd.fancymenu.hide_when_no_update.desc: Automatically hide this button when no update is available. When disabled, the button will always be visible but inactive when there's no update.
When enabled, clicking the button will open the changelog URL configured in AIUTD settings. This happens in addition to any custom actions you configure.
